text:
WITH hospital admission
UK = Unknown CHAR 2 x x x
M2310_ECR_MENTL_BHVRL_PRBLM M2310 Emergent Care Reason- Acute Mental/Behavioral This field indicates that the reason the patient received emergent care was due to acute mental/behavioral health problem. 0 = Not Checked (No), 1 = Checked (Yes) CHAR 1 x x x x
M2310_ECR_CRDC_DSRTHM M2310 Emergent Care Reason- Cardiac Dysrhythmia This field indicates that the reason the patient received emergent care was due to cardiac dysrhythmia. 0 = Not Checked
